(passive monitoring) delivers complete service assurance: passive visibility into every live subscriber session, validated and reproduced under controlled conditions by active synthetic testing."}]]}],["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-8","children":[["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-xl font-serif text-[var(--foreground)] mb-3","children":"How It Works"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-sm text-[var(--muted)] leading-relaxed","children":"nScan provides continuous passive visibility into all live subscriber traffic. When an anomaly is detected, Evolver reproduces the same scenario using synthetic sessions under controlled conditions, confirming the root cause and validating the fix by rerunning the test in the live network. This active-passive loop reduces time to resolution, improves service reliability, and closes the gap between network-side evidence and service-level proof. Together they cover the full observability stack: delivered quality, subscriber experience segmentation, model integrity, SLA verification, revenue integrity, and security resilience."}]]}],["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-8","children":[["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-xl font-serif text-[var(--foreground)] mb-4","children":"Functions
